analysis: The current project has a black hole theme with some UI elements but lacks a cohesive and immersive cosmic design. The theme should focus on dark, cosmic visuals with animations for black holes, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML structure needs to be completed with sections related to black holes, and the CSS should be enhanced to include animations and interactive elements. The JavaScript file should be updated to handle interactive features like animated slides and mobile-friendly navigation.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS includes styles for interactive elements and a cohesive design.

Complete the HTML content to include sections related to black holes, such as an introduction, scientific explanations, and interactive elements like animated slides and planets. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners for interactive features like animated slides and mobile menu toggling.
